home.heroSubtitle: Algorithm concepts explained through the lens of frontend engineering. Stop memorizing solutions. Start recognizing patterns.
home.card1Desc: 10 core algorithms with deep dives into problem patterns, implementation, and step-by-step visualization. Learn at your own pace.
home.card2Desc: Every algorithm is grounded in real frontend use cases — virtual lists, state normalization, event pipelines, and more.
home.card3Desc: Each topic has a built-in AI tutor. Ask questions, get explanations tailored to your level, and explore edge cases interactively.
home.ctaSubtitle: Begin with {firstTopicTitle} or jump to any topic in the curriculum.

algorithms.pageSubtitle: {count} core algorithms, ordered from foundational to advanced. Each topic includes frontend scenarios, visualizations, practice problems, and an AI tutor.

practice.tryFirst: 💡 Work through this before looking at hints.

tutor.subheading: Ask me anything about this topic
tutor.placeholder: e.g. When would I use this in a React app?
tutor.errorMessage: Sorry, I had trouble responding. Please try again.
tutor.greeting: Hi! I can explain {topicTitle} concepts, walk through examples, or help you spot when to apply it.
